CONTACT US
    
    
    
      – Vela
results.content:
We take pride in our products and want your shopping experience with Vela to be the best. If, however, you are not completely satisfied with your order, we will gladly exchange or return your items. Returned items must be received within 30 days for a return or exchange. All items must be unworn and in the original packaging. Please note, return shipping methods and associated costs are the responsibility of the customer.To start your return simply go to: 

Vela products are designed in Los Angeles, CA, and ethically sourced and produced in India.

At VELA, we create timeless, high-quality scarves with a focus on style, comfort, and sustainability. Our mission is to empower self-expression through ethical craftsmanship and thoughtful design.

- [...] -

Accessibility Statement: Vela is committed to making our website accessible and inclusive for all users, including individuals with disabilities. We are actively working to improve the accessibility of our website to ensure we provide equal access to all of our visitors.If you experience any difficulty accessing or navigating our website, or if you have any suggestions to improve accessibility, please contact us at: care@velascarves.com

##### 46reviewsfor Vela

### Rugged Retreat - Seniors beware

Review for a Caribbean - Southern Cruise on Vela

Sail date: February 2025 [...] Sail date: June 2023

We actually embarked in St. Lucia (option not offered on this review page) and sailed to a couple of beautiful spots there before heading to Martinique. The snorkeling at Jade near the Pitons was fabulous, as it was again at Anse D'Arling on Martinique - really amazing diversity of sea life and very easy to access from shore.

Review photo 1

Profile Image

Jammer Lover10+ Cruises • Age 60s

8 Helpful Votes

### Terrible management and no Covid SOP/Protocol

Review for a Caribbean - Eastern Cruise on Vela

Sail date: May 2022 [...] Sail date: January 2019

We chose this cruise because of the ship and the destinations. Vela is a very beautiful, three masted tall-ship. She takes a maximum of 26 passengers with a crew of 10. We had very personal service from the booking process onwards, nothing was difficult. We joined the ship in Rodney Bay, St Lucia. We were taken out to the ship on dinghies.

Profile Image

VBP2-5 Cruises • Age 70s

6 Helpful Votes

### Fun, Relaxing and Adventures

Review for a Caribbean - Southern Cruise on Vela

Sail date: October 2018

This was my 2nd cruise with Island Windjammers. I'll be going on my third in a couple of months. The crew was absolutely amazing, Captain Alexis, Luis, Leah, Romaine, Stephen, Robert, Ponchoo, Frederick, Lennox and last but by no means least, Steelo!

results.title: Book Review Tuesday (7/16/24) – The Vela – The Bookish Mutant
results.content: Becky Chambers was, by far, the author I was most excited about seeing in The Vela. I’ve fallen head-over-heels in love with her cozy sci-fi, as many other readers had. What she contributed to The Vela, however, was a sense of complication. Like The Galaxy, and the Ground Within, where she piled a series of unlikely characters together and had them clash in terms of culture, politics, and personality, Chambers excelled at complicating the relationships between each character. Her cozy agenda made me forget how well she writes cold, fascist characters; the way she wrote General Cynwrig sent chills up my spine, conveying the dull distance she has from every other character. Every interaction with her is nothing but war room strategy, and that’s why she and Niko clashed so fundamentally. [...] Out of all of the authors who contributed to The Vela, I was the most hesitant about Yoon Ha Lee; the one book I’ve read of his was one that didn’t mesh with my style (but that was also his first attempt at middle grade, so that could have been my issue). I read a sample of Ninefox Gambit ages ago and liked it, but not enough to buy it. Consider me proven wrong about him! As the author who started off the novel, he was the perfect choice. His fast-paced prose made for an opening chapter that integrated the reader swiftly and effortlessly into the world of The Vela. Later on, his battle scenes were some of the highlights of the novel; every chase sequence and dogfight is so meticulous that I questioned whether or not he’d actually been in the thick of an intergalactic war. I’ll be seeking [...] and that’s why she and Niko clashed so fundamentally. While toeing over making Cynwrig sympathetic, Chambers gave us a glimpse into her mind without justifying her actions. It’s a difficult dilemma to skirt around, but one that served to develop Niko incredibly; they had a very un-nuanced view of the galaxy, and although their views weren’t changed fundamentally, it allowed them to see different sides without excusing their horrific actions.

results.content:

4. gamergirl17  July 6, 2015 Reply

   I’m stuck on wiring the first hexipal can somebody help me?

   1. AppUnwrapper  July 6, 2015 Reply

      What are you having trouble with? Every game will have a different wiring, but my Hexipal guide should help you figure it out.

      1. gamergirl17  July 6, 2015 Reply

         Oops meant the 2nd time with Vella’s I’m having trouble with the order of connecting them. Like the coloring, blue, yellow, and red. I think I’ve tried almost all the ways possible with the colors but it isn’t working!

         1. AppUnwrapper  July 6, 2015 Reply [...] IΓò¼├┤Γö£├ºΓö£├╗ve kept trying and trying but it hasnΓò¼├┤Γö£├ºΓö£├╗t worked???
      5. Rye  May 27, 2022 Reply

         I don’t remember my version of the wiring for Vela’s hexigal and I don’t know what to do now
   2. Im using PS4  December 13, 2015 Reply

      When I got the hexigal all the way through to the door, she got sucked up through the big hole seperating the kitchen with the control room, did i do something wrong? Do I need to restart or…?

      1. Leaf  March 16, 2017 Reply

         Go into the kitchen, get the thing in the top center to say ‘taco pill Tuesday’ while in the sun thing, and then use the grabby arm.
      2. BR3  February 19, 2023 Reply

         Just go to the kitchen
2. wendy  June 2, 2015 Reply [...] 4. So according to my symbols, my wiring should go like so:

5. Place the Hexipal back into the wiring station and he’ll charge up! If you get three blue bars and a smiling Hexipal, it means it worked. Now hand him over to Alex and let him do his magic. He’s the electronics genius you needed!

6. Vella’s family will run in now. There’s a big cutscene where both ships get moving and end up colliding. Tap on the two ships and you’ll be back with Vella. Talk to Mom (Hope) and find out why she can’t move the ship. Both ships are on autopilot and the NavScarf bot refuses to change course even the slightest bit. So it’s up to Vella and Shay to save the day!

7. First, leave the control room and head right a bit. The safety Hexigal bot is broken on the floor. Pick her up.
